name: Mayoral Size Guide
description: Modern PDP fit finder using reviewed Mayoral measurements and explicit child-size comparisons with other brands.

attribute_definition_groups.name: Mayoral Size Guide
attribute_definition_groups.description: Modern PDP fit finder using reviewed Mayoral measurements and explicit child-size comparisons with other brands.

attribute_definitions.name: Description
attribute_definitions.default_value: Compara otra marca o usa sus medidas. Tardarás menos de un minuto.

attribute_definitions.name: Product kind
attribute_definitions.description: Auto detects common footwear and bottoms terms. Select an explicit kind when catalog naming differs.

attribute_definitions.name: Audience
attribute_definitions.description: The reviewed dataset covers Mayoral children and teen references only.

attribute_definitions.name: Collection
attribute_definitions.description: Optional collection identifier. Boston x Mayoral has a reviewed size-8 override.

attribute_definitions.name: Size variation attribute ID
attribute_definitions.description: Catalog variation attribute used to read availability and select the recommended size.

attribute_definitions.name: Enable age estimate
attribute_definitions.description: Age-only results are always marked as low confidence.
